meaning: n.动物群,动物区系,动物志
examples: This resulted in the "biome," a combination of coexisting flora and fauna.
The news is constantly reporting what human endeavours have caused extensive damage to flora and fauna in the planet.
The deep sea typically has a sparse fauna dominated by tiny worms and crustaceans, with an even sparser distribution of larger animals.
Much of Madagascar's flora and fauna, including its famous lemurs, are unique to the island.
The hope now is to learn more about the fauna during this period and attract further research.
